login_intro: A clear workspace for leads, user access, and company configuration. After the first setup, sign in with the default admin account and change the password immediately.
login_default_hint: Default login: {email}. The initial password is set only through the environment during setup and must not be shown on the login page.
login_access_hint: Only registered users with an active role can access the dashboard.
login_seeded: The default admin account has been created. Sign in with it now and change the password immediately.
account_intro: Manage the password for the current user. A forced password change is active after first setup.
account_forced: This account must set a new password before it can be used further.
account_ui_language_help: This changes the dashboard language for your user account only.
users_intro: Role model with Admin, User, and Viewer. New passwords force a change on first login.
users_admin_help: Full access to users, settings, and leads.
users_user_help: Can read the inbox and update leads.
users_viewer_help: Read-only access for office or reporting users.
users_password_policy_help: Reset accounts must change their password on first login.
settings_intro: Language, model parameters, prompts, and extraction.
settings_saved: Saved. Changes apply on the next worker or call cycle.
settings_empty: The settings table is still empty and will be initialized on the first worker start.
inbox_intro: All incoming calls, callbacks, and manually reviewable cases in one clear workflow view.
search_placeholder: Search by name, city, phone number, or request
lead_none_found: No leads found. New leads will appear here automatically as soon as they arrive.
lead_only_users_admin: Only Users and Admins can update leads.
